description: Generic form field wrapper providing a label (with optional required marker), help text, error message display, and a slot for any form control. Applies error styling when an error message is set.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text displayed above the field.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: When true, a required asterisk is appended to the label.

parameters.name: HelpText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the field when there is no error.

parameters.name: ErrorMessage
parameters.description: Validation error message shown below the field in red.

parameters.name: For
parameters.description: Value for the label's for attribute to associate it with a form control.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS class for the root element.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the field is disabled.

examples.title: Form field with label and help text
examples.code:
<TmFormField Label="Username" Required="true" HelpText="Must be at least 3 characters." For="username">
    <input id="username" type="text" @bind="model.Username" />
</TmFormField>
